title: US, European stocks fall as Iran war drives oil rally, bond selloff
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: US and European stocks fell, oil prices rallied, and government bonds sold off amid concerns over an Iran-related conflict. The U.S. dollar strengthened.
excerpt: US and European stocks fell, oil prices rallied, and government bonds sold off amid concerns over an Iran-related conflict. The U.S. dollar strengthened.

content.introduction: US and European stocks fell, oil prices rallied, and government bonds sold off amid concerns over an Iran-related conflict. The U.S. dollar strengthened.
body: US, European stocks fall as Iran war drives oil rally, bond selloff. www.reuters.com.
